name: Impossible Caramel- Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except coconut in a blender.
2. Blend at high speed for 15 seconds or until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 10-inch pie plate.
4. (Optional) Sprinkle coconut on top.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool completely before cutting.
YIELD: 1 10-inch pie
